acceptance_criteria.text: Authenticated /dashboard/agents loads production API without /api/api path duplication.
proof: Live browser showed Workflow agents 1 and Smoke Supervised Outreach Agent after endpoint path fix.

acceptance_criteria.text: Business owner can see blueprint card, run timeline, run history, and approval queue.
proof: Browser DOM contained Smoke Supervised Outreach Agent, Run timeline, Run history, Approval queue.

acceptance_criteria.text: Completed supervised outreach run exposes full artifact payload and queued but not dispatched boundary.
proof: Browser DOM contained Full payload, Smoke generated text, Queued but not dispatched, and external dispatch did not run text.

acceptance_criteria.text: Starting a new run creates a pending approval visible in approval queue.
proof: Browser DOM contained waiting_approval, pending, reject and approve actions.

acceptance_criteria.text: Run filters show Approval and Completed runs.
proof: Approval filter showed waiting_approval; Completed filter showed completed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Temporary live smoke fixture is removed after verification.
proof: Cleanup returned CLEANED; DB counts users/businesses/blueprints/runs returned 0 for smoke IDs.

acceptance_criteria.text: Build, focused tests, and lint guardrails pass.
proof: npm run build passed; tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py passed 6 tests; scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh passed.

known_gaps: Full-page screenshot capture timed out in the in-app browser; DOM assertions were used.
